source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Raw_LCM_NEw_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week305_') AS Raw_LCM_NEw_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Raw_LCM_NEw_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week305_') AS Raw_LCM_NEw_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Raw_LCM_NEw_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week305_') AS Raw_LCM_NEw_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'tbl_LCM_NewWeek_Tracking_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week305_') AS tbl_LCM_NewWeek_Tracking_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'tbl_LCM_NewWeek_Tracking_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week305_') AS tbl_LCM_NewWeek_Tracking_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'RowCountInsertValidation_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'LoadCheck308_') AS RowCountInsertValidation_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'RowCountInsertValidation_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'LoadCheck308_') AS RowCountInsertValidation_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Export_Format_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS Export_Format_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Export_Format_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS Export_Format_FileName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Export_Format_FilePath' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS Export_Format_FilePath,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lookup_LKP_TABLE_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS Lookup_LKP_TABLE_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Lookup_LKP_TABLE_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS Lookup_LKP_TABLE_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_1_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Extract_Prev_Week312_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_1_SchemaName,

(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Flat_File_Source_ContainerName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task317_') AS Flat_File_Source_ContainerName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Flat_File_Source_FileName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task317_') AS Flat_File_Source_FileName,

(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task317_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,

(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = '_COPYDATACollect_Updates310__File_System_Task313__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'LCM_ScopeAnalysis_2' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = '_COPYDATACollect_Updates310__File_System_Task313_') AS _COPYDATACollect_Updates310__File_System_Task313__source_SchemaName,

scripts.text:
INSERT INTO [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_LCM_TCOO_Diff_Intraday_Archive_dev]


( 
      [PLHIS Contact]
      ,[PLHIS Updated Date]
      ,[Notes]
      ,[Ramservername]
      ,[Lcmstatus]
      ,[TCOOStatus]
      ,[TCOOMigrationStatus]
      ,[Ciodirectname]
      ,[Primarytechmgr]
      ,[Managedbygroup]
      ,[Primary Applicatioin]
      ,[Environment]
      ,[Cio]
      ,[Ciodirect]
      ,[Cistatus]
      ,[Rtstatus]
      ,[Rtplannedactivity]
      ,[Fundingdate]
      ,[Rtdecomdate]
      ,[Rtplancertifieddate]
      ,[Hweoldate]
      ,[Applicationids]
      ,[Normalizedos]
      ,[Eol Hw Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2022]
      ,[Cioname]
      ,[Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023]
      ,[Productname]
      ,[Hds Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2024]
      ,[sourceCIOdirName]
      ,[TCOO Extension Aggregated]
      ,[NewSourceLCM_AsOf]
      ,[ChangeNumber]
      ,[Decom_Date]
      ,[Extension_Date]
      ,[ISPNumber]
,[JiraNumber]
      ,[TCOOPlanningDecomDT]
      ,[Import_date]
)

SELECT [PLHIS Contact]
      ,[PLHIS Updated Date]
      ,[Notes]
      ,[Ramservername]
      ,[Lcmstatus]
      ,[TCOOStatus]
      ,[TCOOMigrationStatus]
      ,[Ciodirectname]
      ,[Primarytechmgr]
      ,[Managedbygroup]
      ,[Primary Applicatioin]
      ,[Environment]
      ,[Cio]
      ,[Ciodirect]
      ,[Cistatus]
      ,[Rtstatus]
      ,[Rtplannedactivity]
      ,[Fundingdate]
      ,[Rtdecomdate]
      ,[Rtplancertifieddate]
      ,[Hweoldate]
      ,[Applicationids]
      ,[Normalizedos]
      ,[Eol Hw Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2022]
      ,[Cioname]
      ,[Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023]
      ,[Productname]
      ,[Hds Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2024]
      ,[sourceCIOdirName]
      ,[TCOO Extension Aggregated]
      ,[NewSourceLCM_AsOf]
      ,[ChangeNumber]
      ,[Decom_Date]
      ,[Extension_Date]
      ,[ISPNumber]
,[JiraNumber],
       [TCOOPlanningDecomDT] 

  
      ,[Import_date]

  FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_LCM_TCOO_Diff_Intraday_dev]
select replace(cast(cast(getdate() as time) as nvarchar(8)),':','_')

update tbl_LCM_PrevWeek_ScopeTracker_dev
set 
Notes = b.Notes
,TCOOMigrationStatus = B.TCOOMigrationStatus
,TCOOStatus = B.TCOOStatus
,Lcmstatus = B.Lcmstatus
,Ciodirectname = B.Ciodirectname
,Primarytechmgr = B.Primarytechmgr
,[PLHIS Contact] = b.[PLHIS Contact]
,[Cistatus] = b.[Cistatus]
,Import_date = B.Import_date
,[TCOO Extension Aggregated] = b.[TCOO Extension Aggregated]
 ,[ISPNumber] = b.[ISPNumber]
,[ChangeNumber] = b.[ChangeNumber] 
 ,[Decom_Date] = b.[Decom_Date]
 ,[Extension_Date] = b.[Extension_Date] 
 , [JiraNumber] =	b.[JiraNumber],
   [TCOOPlanningDecomDT] =b.[TCOOPlanningDecomDT] 

FROM tbl_LCM_PrevWeek_ScopeTracker_dev A 
inner join (select max(ID)MXID , Ramservername FROM tbl_LCM_PrevWeek_ScopeTracker_dev GROUP BY Ramservername) C ON C.Ramservername = A.Ramservername AND C.MXID = A.ID 
INNER JOIN  [tbl_LCM_TCOO_Diff_Intraday_dev] B ON A.Ramservername = B.Ramservername

delete from [dbo].[tbl_LCM_NewWeek_Tracking]

where import_Date  = cast(getdate() as date)
select replace(cast(cast(getdate() as time) as nvarchar(8)),':','_')

delete
  FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_LCM_PlanningWeekly]

where import_Date  = cast(getdate() as date)
select replace(cast(cast(getdate() as time) as nvarchar(8)),':','_')
